title: arundarbor trinii
side_effects: Arundarbor trinii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, diarrhea, and stomach cramps, in individuals with sensitive stomachs. Prolonged use of the plant's extracts can also lead to allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling, particularly in people with pre-existing allergies. In rare cases, excessive consumption of arundarbor trinii can cause liver damage and kidney failure, highlighting the importance of proper dosage and medical supervision. Additionally, the plant may interact with certain medications, including blood thinners and diabetes medications, which can exacerbate underlying health conditions.
